response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ year experience requirement with roughly 15 years of fullstack work, including strong TypeScript/Node.js product experience, React with MongoDB and AWS at Optilyz, and current hands-on AI agent and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, which directly matches the rare 'AI agent development' requirement. A strong testing culture (TDD, CI/CD, test-library authorship) and cloud/container experience round out the profile. Gaps are mostly stack-alignment details: no Nest.js exposure is evident, Kotlin is absent and Java/Python are secondary, and much of the frontend history is Ember rather than React.
strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS
Current AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling experience, matching a hard-to-find requirement
Deep testing and craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses
concerns: No evident Nest.js experience, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin missing and Java/Python exposure appears limited or dated
Significant frontend history is in Ember.js; React depth beyond one role is unclear

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js fullstack depth and testing rigor
